corrections.corrected:
Q. I'm asking for the communication with them -- the answer would be no?
A. Just trying to understand.
Q. With what frequency do you speak with attorneys at the Sher Garner firm?
A. Until this week, probably never.
Q. Fair enough. Are you represented at this deposition by the Sher Garner firm?
A. Yes, I am. That I am aware of.
Q. You are not personally paying their fees, right?
A. That is correct.
Q. Who is paying their fees?
A. Yellow Rock.
Q. Since when have you been represented by Sher Garner?
A. Today.
Q. When did you learn your deposition would be taken?
A. Last week.
Q. What did you do to prepare to give testimony today?
A. Reviewed records with Sher Garner yesterday.
Q. Did Sher Garner provide you the records to review?
A. They were -- they were materials that you had seen before. They were materials I had created.
Q. We may back into your consulting work. I want to back up and talk about White Top. What is White Top?
A. White Top is the parent company of Yellow Rock.
Q. You testified, I think, that White Top was formed in connection with North Summit; is that right?
A. That's right.
Q. Right. And I don't want you to explain -- just tell me the origin of White Top. How was White Top founded?
A. White Top was created solely as a one-field-based organization for the Sulphur Mines acquisition.
Q. Okay.
